heading: Designation of Senate delegates to Conferences of the Interparliamentary Union
label: 276c Designation of Senate delegates to Conferences of the Interparliamentary Union
text: On and after , Senate delegates to Conferences of the Interparliamentary Union shall be designated by the Presiding Officer of the Senate. Not less than two Senators so designated shall be members of the Committee on Foreign Relations.June 30, 1958
notes: Amendments1975— inserted at end “Not less than two Senators so designated shall be members of the Committee on Foreign Relations.”Pub. L. 94–141
amendments: Amendments1975— inserted at end “Not less than two Senators so designated shall be members of the Committee on Foreign Relations.”Pub. L. 94–141
